    Index

    A C D E G H I L M N O P R S U 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    Activity - Class in sims.actions
    Represents an activity that a Sim can perform in the Sims world.
    Activity(String, int, String, int) - Constructor for class sims.actions.Activity
    Constructs an Activity with no financial cost.
    Activity(String, int, String, int, double) - Constructor for class sims.actions.Activity
    Constructs an Activity with a specified financial cost.
    addActivity(Activity) - Method in class sims.world.Loc
    Adds an activity to this location.
    addHomeLocation(HomeLocation) - Method in class sims.world.Home
    Adds a sub-location to this home and sets its parent reference.
    addLocation(OutsideLocation) - Static method in class sims.gameEngine.Game
     
    addLocation(OutsideLocation) - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
     
    addRelationship(int, Relationship) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Adds a relationship to this Sim.
    addSim(Sim) - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
     
    addSim(Sim) - Method in class sims.world.Loc
    Adds a Sim to this location.
    addUpgrade(HomeUpgrade) - Method in class sims.world.HomeLocation
    Adds an upgrade to this home location.
    autoPlay(String, int) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Automatically performs an activity that satisfies a given need.
